description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding wooden storage cabinet with a dark brown finish on three sides and a lighter, textured wood panel on the back. The front features two flat doors with small, round metal handles and a visible lock mechanism, suggesting secure storage. The top surface is flat and smooth, suitable for placing objects. The sides are plain and unadorned, matching the dark wood finish of the front and top. The back panel contrasts with the rest of the cabinet, displaying a lighter, particleboard-like texture. The cabinet stands on short, integrated feet, elevating it slightly above the ground.
description: A rectangular, dark wood storage cabinet with two front doors, metal handles, and a contrasting light wood back panel. The top is flat and smooth, suitable for supporting objects.
description_view_0: Front view showing two flat doors with metal handles and a lock, finished in dark brown wood.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, dark wood panel with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a light, textured wood panel contrasting with the rest of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain, dark wood panel.
